headline: Williams just made a $5.5 billion bet amid data center boom
summary: Williams (WMB) just delivered one of the biggest natural gas headlines of 2026. The Tulsa-based pipeline giant is reportedly nearing its largest acquisition in years with a deal worth about $5.5 billion. The company is buying a private competitor located in the shale basin. Yet, shares fell ...

headline: Why Investors Should Care About Midstream Classifications
summary: The Energy MLP Classification Standard (EMCS) categorizes energy infrastructure companies based on their primary source of cash flows.
